subject: docs(todo): add server-side pagination for submissions
body:
Track the need for API-level pagination on the submissions endpoint.
Currently ResponsesPage fetches all submissions at once, which won't
scale for forms with 1000+ responses. Complements the existing CSV
export scalability item.

Tags: documentation, scalability, performance
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch

title: add server-side pagination for submissions
